title: Iran’s Frantic Attempt to Save Its Ships Before Torpedo Attack
summary_full: The Iranian Navy sought refuge in Sri Lanka and India. While India obliged, Sri Lanka stalled over fears it would threaten its neutrality.
summary_public: The Iranian Navy sought refuge in Sri Lanka and India. While India obliged, Sri Lanka stalled over fears it would threaten its neutrality.

IR.label: neutral
